title: Nothaphoebe splendens
taxonomy: Nothaphoebe splendens belongs to the family Lauraceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Nothaphoebe. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia. Nothaphoebe splendens is classified as a tree species. It is widely distributed in the tropical forests of southern China, Southeast Asia, and India.

The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and infections.
